description: Default capability set for the main VideoDubber window. Grants: core window/event/path access; the dialog + opener plugins; the self-updater (`updater:default` for check/download/install + `process:default`/`process:allow-restart` to relaunch after install); and `shell:allow-execute`/`shell:allow-spawn` SCOPED to the bundled orchestrator externalBin sidecar so src/sidecar.rs can launch it in production. The 3 Python workers are now ONE-DIR resource trees launched directly by Rust (std::process::Command, see spawn_worker) — not via the shell plugin — so they need no shell scope here. The scope entry sets `sidecar:true` with a `name` matching the bundle.externalBin base name and `args:false` because the orchestrator is configured purely via environment variables — never CLI args.
